text.title: Immersive Design Principles Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

conclusion.verdict: still cap session + spatial audio + a11y paths
teleport or smooth-with-vignette; comfort toggle for advanced users

example.trace: 15-min VR lesson with locomotion → vestibular-safe-locomotion → teleport + full spec

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
